docs.title: Introduction
docs.text:
This is the official documentation for Mayuresh's Custom ROM builds.

Here you will find installation instructions, download links, and troubleshooting guides for all officially supported devices.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
Before flashing any builds, ensure you meet the following requirements:

  • Platform Tools: Install the latest ADB & Fastboot tools.
  • Bootloader: Your device bootloader must be unlocked.
  • Backups: Backup all critical data on your device. Formatting data is strictly required.
  • Kernels: Custom kernels are not supported. Do not flash them or report bugs if you do.
  • Recovery: Use only the recommended recovery specified in the installation guide for your device.

docs.title: Community & Support
docs.text: Support is provided via our Telegram group. If you encounter bugs, please provide a full logcat when reporting issues.

docs.title: Devices
docs.text: Select your device to view the available Custom ROMs, Download links, and Installation instructions.

docs.title: Xiaomi
docs.text:
• Redmi Note 12 5G / POCO X5 5G (stone)
  • Redmi Note 11 (spes)

docs.title: Recommended Packages
docs.text:
Most of the Custom ROMs provided here either come with GApps pre-installed (like Project Matrixx) or require you to flash them separately.

If you are downloading a "Vanilla" build (without GApps), we highly recommend using MindTheGapps.

docs.title: MindTheGapps
docs.text:
TIP: This is the officially recommended GApps package for LineageOS.

  • Download: MindTheGapps Website
  • Architecture: Choose arm64
  • Android Version: Choose the version that exactly matches the ROM you are installing (e.g., 13.0 or 14.0).

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
1. Sideload the ROM zip first: adb sideload rom.zip
  2. Reboot to Recovery.
  3. Sideload the GApps zip: adb sideload gapps.zip
  4. Reboot to System.

WARNING: Do NOT flash GApps if the ROM specifies it already includes them (e.g., "GApps Build"). Doing so will cause bootloops.

docs.title: Redmi Note 11 (spes)
docs.text: Specs SoC Snapdragon 680 4G RAM 4/6 GB Storage 64/128 GB Battery 5000 mAh Display 6.43" 90Hz AMOLED

docs.title: Downloads
docs.text: Get the builds here

docs.title: Guides
docs.text: • Installation

docs.title: Special boot modes
docs.text:
• Recovery: With the device powered off, hold Volume Up + Power. Keep holding both buttons until the MI logo appears on the screen, then release.
  • Fastboot: With the device powered off, hold Volume Down + Power. Keep holding both buttons until the word FASTBOOT appears on the screen, then release.

docs.text: You can find assistance with Custom ROMs on our Telegram chat.

docs.text: If you'd like to report a bug, follow the instructions here.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text: If you encounter issues while flashing or using the ROMs, check the common solutions below.

docs.title: Bootloop after flashing
docs.text: This usually happens if you forgot to format data or if you flashed an incompatible kernel or GApps package. Solution: 1. Boot into Recovery. 2. Select Factory Reset -> Format data / factory reset. 3. Reboot to System.

docs.title: Error 1 during sideload
docs.text: This means the recovery failed to install the zip. It could be a corrupted download or an incompatible recovery. Solution: 1. Verify the SHA256 checksum of the downloaded file. 2. Ensure you are using the exact Recovery recommended in the device's installation instructions.

docs.title: Need more help?
docs.text: If you are still stuck, feel free to reach out to the community on Telegram. Make sure to provide a logcat if you are experiencing crashes!

docs.title: ⚠️ Before You Begin
docs.text:
• Backup all important data to an external source. This process will erase your internal storage.
  • A clean flash is mandatory if you're switching from another ROM.
  • You must be on the latest firmware available for your device and region. Flash it manually if needed before proceeding.
  • Recommended Recovery: Use AOSP recovery.

ℹ️ Note on Navigation: Inside AOSP recovery, use the Volume Up/Down buttons to navigate through options and the Power Button to select/confirm.

docs.title: 🧹 Clean Flash (Recommended for First-Time Install)
docs.text:
1. Boot into Fastboot mode
  2. Power off your device and use the hardware button combo (Volume Down + Power) OR

  3. Run: 

    adb reboot bootloader

  4. Flash the recovery image 

    fastboot flash boot recovery.img

  5. Reboot into Recovery 

    fastboot reboot recovery

  6. Format data

  7. In recovery: Factory Reset > Format Data

  8. Connect the phone to your PC

  9. Sideload the ROM

  10. In recovery: Apply update > Apply from ADB

  11. On your PC, run: 

    adb sideload rom_file.zip

  12. Reboot

  13. After sideloading completes, go back to the main menu and select Reboot system now.
